target_name: SolaceAGI API — Malformed JSON returns 401/422 not 500
context: OWASP API Security A1: Broken Object Level Authorization. James Bach (SBTM): a server that returns 500 on malformed input is leaking stack traces. Auth is checked before body parsing (correct fail-closed). Must return 401 (no auth) or 422 (parse error) — NOT 500. stdout_contains '40' matches both 401 and 422.
